items.text:
# **CASTING CALL for a SHORT fantasy film - PAID roles- CHICAGO **

**PROJECT TITLE: Shed**

**PROJECT TYPE:** Short film Drama/Fantasy

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Searching Productions

**PRODUCTION TEAM: Writer/Director - Stephanie Jeter; EP - Lilly Wachowski**

**UNION STATUS: **Open to union and non-union actors -**PAID**

**PROJECT SYNOPSIS:** A couple’s harmonious relationship begins to unravel when the woman comes home to unexpectedly find a locked shed in her back yard and a husband who won’t tell her what’s inside.

**LOCATION**: Chicago, IL or surrounding area (exact location TBD)

**SHOOT DATES: June 1-June 7**

**ROLES:**

**These roles are for actors local to Chicagoland only**

**LAYLA** - woman, 30-39, Black: A high-achieving soror type whose curiosity might be getting the best of her. 

**RANDALL** - man, 30-39, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: An easygoing and sensitive man in the midst of an identity crisis. 

**LITTLE BOY** - boy, 8-11, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: Newly recovered from a battle with a life-threatening illness he tries his best to present a brave face for his family. (This is a non-speaking role.)

EXPECTED HOURS: TBD

ADDITIONAL COMPENSATION: Transportation reimbursement (capped)

**SUBMISSION DETAILS: Please send a head shot, resume, and reel (if available) to** **ShedFilmChi@gmail.com**, 

**SUBJECT:  ‘Cast submission -***** Role*****’.** 

**Please submit no later than April 29, 2026.**

**If you are invited to audition, we will provide sides and ask that you submit a self-taped audition.*

**CALL BACKS:** Callbacks and chemistry reads will be held between May 4th and May 7th in Chicago.

Follow us on: Instagram **shed.movie**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Shed without Context'

items.text:
***[Casting Call - Malay Kids Cooking Show]***

The Moving Visuals Co. is currently looking for kids to feature in an upcoming Malay Kids Cooking Show, "Ai Ai Cef 2"

**Details:**

**Film Period: **30th May 2026 - 11th June 2026. Kids are only needed for one day from period mentioned.

**Deadline**

Submit ASAP **(Best By end of April). **Contact the number below if more time is needed.

**Requirements**

1. Aged 7-12

2. Can converse in Malay

3. Fun & Out-Going

4. Have basic cooking skills. (Able to follow a recipe)

If interested do send in a recent photo and one minute video of introducing yourself with answers to the following questions. Video is to be done in Malay.

* What is your favourite food?

* What are the food(s) that you like to cook and why?

For more questions & submission of deliverables, do send in an email to production3@tmvc.sg & CC naqeaosman@tmvc.sg & casting@tmvc.sg

Feel free to contact me ( Iman ) at 9326 3626

You asked. We listened.

Maktub School of Acting has extended the pre-term deadline.

See updated dates!

Apply now!
If not now, then when? 

#ItsMoreThanActing
#TheSolution

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'CRAFT CREATIVITY COMMUNITY CULTURE A SCHOOL OF ACTING PRE-TERM TERM We officially launch in September. Before that, we build. 12 WEEK INTENSIVE THURSDAYS, 10AM LONDON 6PM SHOWCASE to CONCLUDE APPLY NOW!'

💃 MAHILIG KA BANG SUMAYAW AT NAGHAHANAP NG TRABAHO? 🕺
🚨 WE ARE MASSIVE HIRING DANCERS! 🚨

✨ No experience? No problem!

Open kami sa beginners—may professional coaches na magta-train sa’yo!

🎥 Position: TikTok Live Dancer

🌟 Bakit ka sasali sa amin?

Gawin mong career ang passion mo sa pagsasayaw habang kumikita!

💰 Competitive Salary + Bonuses

🎓 FREE Dance Training + Content & Livestream Mentoring

👗 Costumes, Equipment & Studio Provided

🏠 Stay-in / Stay-out options available

🗓️ Work Details:

• Full-time position

• 9 hours per day

• Weekly day off

• Open for with or without experience

• Kailangan lang: confident sumayaw sa harap ng camera

📍 Location:

CBC Asia Techzone, Aguinaldo Highway, Bacoor, Cavite

📩 Interested?

Message us now and start your journey with our growing dance family! ✨

items.text:
Casting for an incredible cool music video! Male and female roles. Shooting some scenes Monday 27th April in manchester,UK. Cinematic narrative with elements of horror and gothic modernism! Voluntary , with an IMDb credit and images and footage for your portfolio.  Submitting to festivals . Have a listen on Spotify. Email enquiries to irishshowreelscasting@gmail.com 

Characters include bikers and rockers, office workers , burlesque dancers, lady killers and people with interesting faces!  All roles are very juicy. Email or DM images and mark as “music video”

Spotify 

https://open.spotify.com/artist/416Bwr5ukAONtKXYtWNx7j

sharedPost.text:
Always something FRESH going on in my class! Whether it’s street, a musical theatre partner number, something lyrical or a festive Christmas group dance, we like to change it up every few weeks. I do this whilst also keeping things at a steady and manageable pace. (It is a class for beginners after all!) 

#beginnersdance #Liverpool #somethingtodo #tryitchallenge #liverpoolfitness

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL (PAID) – BLIND / VISUALLY IMPAIRED ACTOR (LONDON)

Hello everyone,

I’m an independent filmmaker based in London, currently working on a short film.

I’m looking to cast a blind or visually impaired male (age 40–65) — a warm, thoughtful, and quietly humorous man whose conversation changes someone’s life.

About the role –   
• Male, approximately 40–65  
• Blind or visually impaired  
• Calm, natural presence and comfortable speaking  
• Acting experience is welcome but not required

About the film  
This is a simple, human story about perspective, life pressure, and finding peace in everyday moments. It will be shot with a small, respectful team.

Filming details  
📍 London (park & footpath scenes)  
📅 1–2 days shoot (dates flexible - end June)  

I would really love to work with someone whose lived experience can bring authenticity and depth to this role.

If you or someone you know might be interested, please send me a message with a short introduction.

Feel free to share this post — it would mean a lot 🙏

Thank you.

topComments.text: T6 The Showman’s Studio london 5 mins from Heathrow

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'To Studio Showman's Atul Sharma 07534684735 Studio Manager atulsharma55(@hotmail.com com http:/theshowmansstudio.co. co uk/ ansstudio. ST. MARY'S HOSPITAL ST.MARYSHOSPITAL-MANENTRANC MAIN ENTRANCI MODERN MODERNFACILITIES FACILITIES State-of-the-art hospital entrance with accessible features for patients and visitors. EXPERT CONSULTATION Private consultation rooms with advanced technology and experienced medical professionals. COMFORTABLE WARDS Spacious hospital wards providing quality care and patient monitoring. Dola AI'

items.text:
James Connolly: Actor improvised monologue “Reflections on my Father” 🥹🤩🥳🎭🎬🙌👍
Experienced stage & film/background actor & pro vocalist James Connolly: 

West Midlands productions of The Crucible, Journey’s End & Talking Heads - West End variety & musical theatre tours 2006 - 2008 - 

Featured background extra roles in 

“Mary Queen of Scots” feature film 2018

“Everybody’s Talking About Jamie” film 2019

Passenger music video 2020 - - 

Checkout my Self tape original monologue “Reflections on my father” - recalling my dear late dad’s personality & life circumstances leading to his passing 🥹🤩🥳🎬🎭❤️🙌

To contact me for possible casting opportunities:

Mob: 07852116434 

Email: jamcon1981@gmail.com

items.previewDescription: Can I make it as an actor at 16? MY JOURNEY STARTS NOW!!
items.title: Magnus Ispas

topComments.text:
Unless you’re rich, I’d avoid moving to Los Angeles.  You can get so much further by staying in Europe and sending audition tapes from here.

If you get an in person audition, I’d advise renting a room for a month or so in LA and book as many in person auditions while you’re in town.

Rent, even for a room in a less desirable area, is outrageous!  After moving to Germany from Seattle, I now pay more than $800 LESS per month in rent and I live in a furnished apartment that is ~ 1.5 to 2 times the rate than would be charged on the unfurnished market.

My utilities, groceries, healthcare, etc. are ALL cheaper in Germany.

Get experience here and in the UK before heading to the USA.

sharedPost.text:
Best Unpublished Play Award Win!
**Alternate Shadows are proud to announce winning the Best Unpublished Play in the Maidenhead Drama Festival for Matthew Fray's Comedy `Just Business'  **

This was our first time at the festival held at ***Norden Farm Centre for the Arts, in Maidenhead. ***This was the last play Matthew wrote and we dedicate the performance to Matthew and his memory, which is so pleasing to us to see his play formerly recognised in a play festival. It's a light political comedy that satirises the relationships between world leaders, blending public diplomacy with private tension. Set behind closed doors in Whitehall, the play explores themes like energy security while balancing political stakes with personal ambition. 

Adjudicator Andrew Head **PhD, GoDA Assoc **commented that our performances were consistently strong. **Richard Harding** as the Prime Minister striking a fine balance between authority and vulnerability, while **Emily McCarthy **brought confidence and a sassy presence as Charlotte the PM's wife. **Sophia Harding’s** understated Northern aide contrasting nicely with the more exaggerated visiting dignitaries. **Paul Belsey’s **President was - stylised, absurd, and sharply timed while **Alan Tolhurst** as Touran the translator provided one of the evening’s best entrances and finally **Felim McCarthy** as Graham the Chancellor provided a wonderful cameo spaghetti western dual. 

The staging was straightforward and effective, facilitating quick entrances and exits that are vital for farce. The costumes were sharp and commanding, anchoring the characters before their inevitable descent into comedic chaos. Lighting was cleverly altered at crucial points, moving beyond a simple general wash to introduce a warm tone and a vibrant glow, complemented by John Hicks’ distinctive original score.

**"This was an accomplished company of actors. Who I felt were at the top of their game, working with good material, inventive imagery and a keen awareness of the nature of farce". **

**Andrew Head ****PhD, GoDA Assoc**

Our next performance of this play will be at The Henley Play Festival on  **Wed 6th May **at **The Kenton Theatre** in Henley-on-Thames.

items.text:
MALE ACTOR WANTED - AGE: 23-30
*During a summer abroad, two twin sisters fall for the same charismatic man; their rivalry develops into an intense game, and they begin to merge into each other’s identities, at the expense of their own sense of self.*

This feature film explores themes such as love, loyalty, rivalry, and identity, with symbolism drawn from Chinese philosophy and a spiritual concept.

We are producing a psychological drama and are looking for a male actor for our lead character, who is charismatic, unpredictable, intellectual, and creative. A big plus if you are musical and play an instrument, or sing.

We are aiming to film in early September 2026 (three weeks), in Belgrade and the Serbian countryside. As this is a low-budget production, we unfortunately cannot offer compensation at this time.

Fluent English is required.

All nationalities are welcome!

Get in touch if you are our actor!! Write to us at twintideproduction@gmail.com. Please note: mark the subject line with: “MALE ACTOR First Name Last Name”.

/Nicole & Michaela

🎬 CASTING STATYSTÓW – NOWY SERIAL PREMIUM! 🎬  
Kamedstudio  

Zapraszamy kobiety i mężczyzn (wiek 16+) mieszkających w Stanisławowie i okolicach (okolice Puszczy Kampinoskiej), do udziału w nagraniach nowego, współczesnego serialu premium!  

🎥 O serialu:  
„Konwojent” to historia mężczyzny w kryzysie wieku średniego, który, aby wyciągnąć rodzinę z długów, rozpoczyna ryzykowną grę — przy okazji całkowicie zmieniając swoje dotychczasowe życie.  

Producentem serialu jest Telemark (m.in. Heweliusz, Wielka Woda).  

📍 Lokalizacja: Stanisławów i okolice (Puszcza Kampinoska)  
📅 Zdjęcia: maj 2026  
💰 Stawki: od 120 zł netto/dzień zdjęciowy (w zależności od planu – dzienny lub nocny)  

To świetna okazja, żeby zobaczyć, jak wygląda plan filmowy „od kuchni”! 🎥  

📆 terminy nagrań:  
➡️  5 i 6 maja

📩 Zgłoszenia:  
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

➡️ W tytule maila wpisz: STANISŁAWÓW  

➡️ W treści podaj (wg punktów):  
- imię i nazwisko 
- 2 zdjęcia (portret + sylwetka)  
- numer telefonu  
- wiek  
- rozmiar ubrania  
- rozmiar buta  
- miejsce zamieszkania!!!  

Do zobaczenia na planie

items.text: Do Niemieckiego serialu sensacyjnego „8 BILLION” poszukujemy statystów z Poznania lub okolic

sharedPost.text:
Do Niemieckiego serialu sensacyjnego „8 BILLION” poszukujemy statystów z Poznania lub okolic. To będą pojedyncze sceny, więc plany zdjęciowe nie będą trwały długo. Zdjęcia w Poznaniu w dniach od 28 kwietnia do 2 maja. Wynagrodzenie 201 zł brutto (189 zł na rękę).

KOGO SZUKAMY?
Na wtorek 28.04:
- Postawnych, wysokich mężczyzn do roli ochroniarzy
- Panów którzy wcielą się w postacie porywaczy/przestępców
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy
- Lokaja/Kamerdynera najlepiej o szpakowatych włosach
- Kelnera
- Kobiet i mężczyzn - klientów restauracji

Na środę 29.04:
- Postawnych, mężczyzn do roli ochroniarzy
- Kobietę i mężczyznę – pracowników biurowych
- Kobietę, pacjentkę w szpitalu
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy

Na czwartek 30.04
- 20 kobiet i mężczyzn którzy wcielą się w rolę dziennikarzy

Na piątek  1.05
- Ochroniarza

Na sobotę 2.05
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy

Na zgłoszenia czekamy do piątku 24.04 do godziny 9:00 rano.
Formularz do zgłoszenia oraz link do trailela w komentarzu

items.text:
NOW CASTING:

Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me or @bellavlasis a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

items.text:
*🎮 CASTING DO GRY HORROR „PĘTLA KARY” 🎮*  

Tworzę grę z gatunku horror psychologiczny o moralnych wyborach. (Inspirowanym serią filmów Piła)
Szukam osób pełnoletnich 18–67 lat_, które chcą użyczyć grze swojej twarzy i/lub głosu.

*UWAGA:* To dzieło fikcji. Gra nie gloryfikuje przemocy, nie nawołuje do łamania prawa. To studium winy i konsekwencji.

_Role dzieci 3–17 lat: wyłącznie za pisemną zgodą opiekuna prawnego. Postaci dziecięce nie biorą udziału w scenach przemocy. Głos może być nagrany przez dorosłego aktora.

*👥 Kogo szukam?*  
- *Wizerunku* – Twoja twarz/sylwetka jako postać 3D w grze
- *Głosu* – dubbing/dialogi postaci

*🎁 Co oferuję?*  
- *💰 Wynagrodzenie:* 200 zł płatne po podpisaniu umowy + % z zysków netto ze sprzedaży gry, na podstawie umowy licencyjnej
- *🎭 Twoja postać w grze:* imię w napisach końcowych, wpływ na wygląd postaci
- *🎮 Dostęp do testów:* zamknięta wersja beta po podpisaniu NDA, na prośbę
- *🆓 Klucz do gry:* darmowa kopia po premierze

*📄 Formalności i RODO*  
1. Z wybranymi osobami podpisuję *umowę o wykorzystanie wizerunku* i/lub *umowę o dzieło/licencyjną na głos*.
2. Umowa określa: zakres, terytorium, czas użycia, wynagrodzenie, Twoje prawa osobiste.
3. Dane osobowe i nadesłane materiały przetwarzam zgodnie z RODO, tylko na potrzeby castingu i produkcji. Nie udostępniam osobom trzecim. Masz prawo do wglądu, poprawy i usunięcia danych.
4. Udzielasz niewyłącznej licencji na wykorzystanie wizerunku/głosu tylko w grze _Pętla Kary_ i materiałach promocyjnych.
5. Wypłata wynagrodzenia po podpisaniu umowy i przekazaniu materiałów.

---

*📸 ZGŁOSZENIA – WIZERUNEK*  
Wyślij PW z tytułem: `Pętla Kary - Wizerunek: [Imię postaci z listy]`  

*1. Filmik 30-90s* opowiadający o sobie:  
Imię, nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, cechy szczególne, zainteresowania, dlaczego ten projekt?

*2. Zdjęcia:* en face, profil, cała sylwetka. Dobre światło, neutralne tło.

*3. Jeśli chcesz też dubbingować*, dodaj próbki głosu .wav/.mp3 w emocjach: radość, smutek, złość, spokój, strach, wina.  
*Tekst próbny:*  
_"Proszę wysoki sądzie... ja nie chciałem. To miał być żart. Jeden głupi zakład. Skąd miałem wiedzieć, że pętla nie wytrzyma? Patrzę teraz na tę kartkę z wyrokiem i dalej nie wierzę. Dwadzieścia lat. Za pięć sekund mojej głupoty. Gdybym mógł cofnąć czas... ale nie mogę. Więc powiedz mi, co mam zrobić, żebyście mi uwierzyli?"_

*🎤 ZGŁOSZENIA – GŁOS*  
Wyślij PW z tytułem: `Pętla Kary - Głos: [Imię postaci z listy]`  

*1. Nagranie 30-90s* opowiadające o sobie:  
Imię, nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, cechy szczególne, zainteresowania, dlaczego ten projekt?

*2. Próbki głosu* .wav/.mp3 w emocjach: radość, smutek, złość, spokój, strach, wina.  
*Tekst próbny:*  
_"Proszę wysoki sądzie... ja nie chciałem. To miał być żart. Jeden głupi zakład. Skąd miałem wiedzieć, że pętla nie wytrzyma? Patrzę teraz na tę kartkę z wyrokiem i dalej nie wierzę. Dwadzieścia lat. Za pięć sekund mojej głupoty. Gdybym mógł cofnąć czas... ale nie mogę. Więc powiedz mi, co mam zrobić, żebyście mi uwierzyli?"_

---

*📅 Rekrutacja trwa do: 23.08.2026*  
*🚀 Start skanów/nagrań: 01.09.2026*  
Wybranym osobom udostępnię szczegółowy profil postaci i fragment scenariusza.

---

*🧠 PĘTLA KARY – LISTA POSTACI DO OBSADZENIA*

items.summary:
*🎮 CASTING DO GRY HORROR „PĘTLA KARY” 🎮*  

Tworzę grę z gatunku horror psychologiczny o moralnych wyborach. (Inspirowanym serią filmów Piła)
Szukam osób pełnoletnich 18–67 lat_, które chcą użyczyć grze swojej twarzy i/lub głosu.

*UWAGA:* To dzieło fikcji. Gra nie gloryfikuje przemocy, nie nawołuje do łamania prawa. To studium winy i konsekwencji.

_Role dzieci 3–17 lat: wyłącznie za pisemną zgodą opiekuna prawnego. Postaci dziecięce nie biorą udziału w scenach przemocy. Głos może być nagrany przez dorosłego aktora.

*👥 Kogo szukam?*  
- *Wizerunku* – Twoja twarz/sylwetka jako postać 3D w grze
- *Głosu* – dubbing/dialogi postaci

*🎁 Co oferuję?*  
- *💰 Wynagrodzenie:* 200 zł płatne po podpisaniu umowy + % z zysków netto ze sprzedaży gry, na podstawie umowy licencyjnej
- *🎭 Twoja postać w grze:* imię w napisach końcowych, wpływ na wygląd postaci
- *🎮 Dostęp do testów:* zamknięta wersja beta po podpisaniu NDA, na prośbę
- *🆓 Klucz do gry:* darmowa kopia po premierze

*📄 Formalności i RODO*  
1. Z wybranymi osobami podpisuję *umowę o wykorzystanie wizerunku* i/lub *umowę o dzieło/licencyjną na głos*.
2. Umowa określa: zakres, terytorium, czas użycia, wynagrodzenie, Twoje prawa osobiste.
3. Dane osobowe i nadesłane materiały przetwarzam zgodnie z RODO, tylko na potrzeby castingu i produkcji. Nie udostępniam osobom trzecim. Masz prawo do wglądu, poprawy i usunięcia danych.
4. Udzielasz niewyłącznej licencji na wykorzystanie wizerunku/głosu tylko w grze _Pętla Kary_ i materiałach promocyjnych.
5. Wypłata wynagrodzenia po podpisaniu umowy i przekazaniu materiałów.

---

*📸 ZGŁOSZENIA – WIZERUNEK*  
Wyślij PW z tytułem: `Pętla Kary - Wizerunek: [Imię postaci z listy]`  

*1. Filmik 30-90s* opowiadający o sobie:  
Imię, nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, cechy szczególne, zainteresowania, dlaczego ten projekt?

*2. Zdjęcia:* en face, profil, cała sylwetka. Dobre światło, neutralne tło.

*3. Jeśli chcesz też dubbingować*, dodaj próbki głosu .wav/.mp3 w emocjach: radość, smutek, złość, spokój, strach, wina.  
*Tekst próbny:*  
_"Proszę wysoki sądzie... ja nie chciałem. To miał być żart. Jeden głupi zakład. Skąd miałem wiedzieć, że pętla nie wytrzyma? Patrzę teraz na tę kartkę z wyrokiem i dalej nie wierzę. Dwadzieścia lat. Za pięć sekund mojej głupoty. Gdybym mógł cofnąć czas... ale nie mogę. Więc powiedz mi, co mam zrobić, żebyście mi uwierzyli?"_

*🎤 ZGŁOSZENIA – GŁOS*  
Wyślij PW z tytułem: `Pętla Kary - Głos: [Imię postaci z listy]`  

*1. Nagranie 30-90s* opowiadające o sobie:  
Imię, nazwisko, wiek, wzrost, cechy szczególne, zainteresowania, dlaczego ten projekt?

*2. Próbki głosu* .wav/.mp3 w emocjach: radość, smutek, złość, spokój, strach, wina.  
*Tekst próbny:*  
_"Proszę wysoki sądzie... ja nie chciałem. To miał być żart. Jeden głupi zakład. Skąd miałem wiedzieć, że pętla nie wytrzyma? Patrzę teraz na tę kartkę z wyrokiem i dalej nie wierzę. Dwadzieścia lat. Za pięć sekund mojej głupoty. Gdybym mógł cofnąć czas... ale nie mogę. Więc powiedz mi, co mam zrobić, żebyście mi uwierzyli?"_

---

*📅 Rekrutacja trwa do: 23.08.2026*  
*🚀 Start skanów/nagrań: 01.09.2026*  
Wybranym osobom udostępnię szczegółowy profil postaci i fragment scenariusza.

---

items.text:
🎦‼️CASTING‼️🎦
Poszukiwani aktorzy, do filmu fabularnego (krótki metraż) kręconego na taśmie filmowej 16mm🎞️, z bardzo zdolną ekipą i ogromnym nastawieniem na międzynarodowe festiwale filmowe!

——————

Dwie rolę męskie:

ŻOŁNIERZE w wieku 39-55lat. 

(Antagoniści) 

Termin wstępny: dwa dni zdjęciowe 30.05 oraz 31.05 (weekend), miejscowość: Sędziszów. (organizowany transport na plan, wyżywienie oraz nocleg) 

zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać bezpośrednio przez Facebook, w komentarzu, wiadomości lub na e-mail: bartlomiejherman3@gmail.com

items.text:
Christian Weiße in "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze", Spannung, Präsenz und glaubwürdige TV-Momente 

In der Folge "Mein Auto, dein Auto" aus "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze" bin ich in einem der spannendsten Handlungsstränge des Formats zu sehen. Aus einem scheinbar harmlosen Moment beim Magnetangeln wird plötzlich eine hochexplosive Lage, genau diese Verdichtung aus Alltag, Zuspitzung und glaubwürdigem Spiel macht für mich den besonderen Reiz solcher Produktionen aus. 

Mein Dank geht an Joyn, Sat.1 und ganz besonders an filmpool für ein Format, das Tempo, Spannung und Publikumsnähe so wirkungsvoll verbindet. Solche Produktionen zeigen, wie wichtig jedes präzise gesetzte Bild, jede glaubwürdige Reaktion und jede stimmige Figur für die Gesamtwirkung einer Szene ist. 

Ich bringe in solche Einsätze nicht nur natürliche Präsenz vor der Kamera ein, sondern auch ein tiefes Verständnis für Bildwirkung, Timing, Atmosphäre und Produktionsabläufe. Genau diese Verbindung aus Darsteller, Content Creator, Produzent und Kameramensch macht mich für unterschiedlichste Formate interessant, ob TV, Werbung, Doku-Fiction, Social Ads oder fiktionale Stoffe mit realitätsnaher Tonalität. 

Wer für fiktive zukünftige Projekte einen verlässlichen, kameraaffinen und vielseitig einsetzbaren Darsteller sucht, findet in mir eine starke, professionelle und teamorientierte Besetzung mit Gespür für Szenen, Menschen und Wirkung. Köln ist meine Basis, Einsätze gern auch darüber hinaus. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse und Partner von Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation aka Sanny4me aka Elternnotperfect 

#ChristianWeiße #AufStreife #AufStreifeDieNeuenEinsätze #Joyn #Sat1 #filmpool #Darsteller #Showreel #Schauspiel #Kleindarsteller #Komparse #TVProduktion #ScriptedReality #Storytelling #Kameraaffin

items.text:
Hello everyone 🙂

CASTING CALL BLACK, ASIAN OR MIXED ACTRESS (VOICE OVER ROLE FOR VIDEO GAME)

I am currently casting for a narrative-driven VR project at Escape Studios titled Heavy is the Crown, and I am looking for a voice actress to portray the lead role of Lenore Vespen.

Lenore is a complex, emotionally layered character, and the performance is voice-over led, with a strong focus on internal monologue, subtlety, and psychological depth.

For this role, we are specifically seeking a Black, Asian or mixed-race actress, as the character is of African and Asian heritage.

I would love to invite any actress interested to submit a self-tape for the role. Please find attached the casting brief, which includes full details of the project and a monologue for audition.

This is a student industry project with a £100 honorarium, offering a strong, narrative-focused piece for showreel, as well as collaboration within a semi-professional production environment.

Self-tape deadline is set on April 30th and the recording session will take place on the week starting May 4th, the day will be set at the actress's convenience.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions—I’d be very happy to provide further information.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Don’t hesitate to share to any actress you think might fit the role I would really appreciate it,

Thanks,

Mary-Jane
Director

items.text:
Casting Call for a student short film that I am filming next week. Relevant information is included as attached. 

If you have any questions, or if you are interested, please email me at Osworld.media@gmail.com and provide a headshot and/or small showreel, and I shall provide a copy of the script and discuss futher with you.

I am looking for a male and female aged 30+ to play the roles of the mother and father of my protagonist. The parents are featured in two scenes in the film, totalling to approximately 3-4 minutes of sceen time.

Please respond as soon as you can if you are interested, as filming will take place on either Sunday 12th April or Monday 13th April, depending on what is most convenient

Many thanks

items.text:
BOEING BOEING ACTOR CALL OUT!
Rowntree Players are delighted to announce that audition registration for Boeing Boeing is now open✈️

Don’t miss your chance to be part of this fast-paced, hilarious comedy — we’d love to see you there!

Register now and get ready for take-off… 👀✨

Click the link to read our audition pack and register - https://www.rowntreeplayers.co.uk/ 

🎭 Boeing Boeing

📅 23rd - 25th July 2026

📍 The Joseph Rowntree Theatre, York

Cleared for Takeoff: A High-Flying Farce!�This 1960s French farce adapted for the English-speaking stage features self-styled Parisian lothario Bernard, who has Italian, German and American fiancées, each a beautiful airline hostess with frequent “layovers.” He keeps “one up, one down, and one pending” – until unexpected schedule changes bring all three to Paris, and Bernard’s apartment, at the same time.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: PAID SHORT FILM
We are currently casting for a Canada Council / BC Arts Council-funded short film set for production in late May. Details below!

**LOGLINE**: On her final shift at her family’s struggling business, a young woman grapples with mounting guilt as she prepares to leave for university, knowing it will mean leaving her immigrant parents behind.

**PRODUCTION DATES**: Tuesday, May 19th - Sunday, May 24th, 2026

**RATES**: $200 per day

Both **UNION AND NON-UNION** encouraged to submit!

We are looking for the following characters:

**MAMAN** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker.

Maman is a sharp, no-nonsense mother who is practical, blunt, and often unintentionally funny. Beneath it all is someone who has sacrificed deeply and holds everything together, expressing her love through control, criticism, and constant caretaking.

**BABA** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker. Aloof, kind, often in his own world.

Baba is a gentle, soft-spoken man who was once educated and respected but has quietly let that life go. He is polite and peacekeeping, with a quiet dignity shaped by sacrifice, and only pushes back when he has to.

**Please submit your materials to eastvancasting@gmail.com**

Thank you!

Baba is a gentle, soft-spoken man who was once educated and respected but has quietly let that life go. He is polite and peacekeeping, with a quiet dignity shaped by sacrifice, and only pushes back when he has to.

**Please submit your materials to eastvancasting@gmail.com**

Thank you!

items.text:
🎭 ONLINE 1:1 ACTING COACH 🎬

Led by experienced tutors, these 30 or 60 minute sessions are fun, flexible and fully tailored to each child—building confidence, creativity, screen technique and more in a safe, supportive environment. Whether they’re just starting out, growing their talent or needing some help with a last minute self-tape, we offer support and guidance each step of the way in this ever-evolving industry!

Contact us today for more information - classes@mcaa.co.uk

www.cherrypipsacting.co.uk

🚨 We’re expanding our books! 🚨 

With large shoot dates coming this summer we are opening our books and looking for more artists based in Cardiff who are aged 50+

TO APPLY- Please create a profile on our Alessi Hartigan UK Casting page, from there we will contact you with specific casting briefs! 

This is a fully paid job in line with the Equity Pact 2026 rates. 

🧡To all of our wonderful and reliable existing SAs- we will of course touch base with you first, but due to the crowd requirements we will need more! Please share with your friends and other reliable SAs.

items.text:
If It's Yours It's Yours — The Mindset No One Teaches Actors 

Nobody teaches you this part.

"Get out of your head. If it's yours, it's yours. If it's not, it's not."

The role doesn't care how hard you want it.
The actors who last in this industry aren't the ones who want it the most — they're the ones who've learned to do their best work and let go.

Leave the ego at the door. Stop treating every audition like it's the end of the world. Surround yourself with people you trust. And when it's done — release it.
Because sometimes not getting the role is the universe doing you a favor.

This is the mental shift that changes everything.
Start your 7-day free trial here: 
https://howtoselftape.com

items.text:
🌟 **CASTING CALL: Male-Identifying Performer for Danny Go! Tribute Show** 🌟
Are you ready to bring the energy and get everyone moving? We are casting a vibrant, male-identifying performer to step into the shoes of Danny Go! for an exciting live tribute show at Otterspool Adventure in Liverpool.

**📍 Location:** Otterspool Adventure, Liverpool
**📅 Initial Dates:** 16th & 17th May
*(Note: There will be further work available throughout the year in this role and within our numerous other productions!)*

**The Role:**
 * You will host and perform a fast-paced, 30-minute scripted one-man show.
 * You must be highly confident, able to command the stage, and bring massive amounts of energy.
 * Crucially, you must have the skills to keep an audience of toddlers fully engaged and entertained from start to finish!
* Visually, you'll be able to accurately portray the role of Danny Go!

**Remuneration:**
 * **Rehearsals:** Paid hourly at the National Minimum Wage (NMW) for your age group.
 * **Performance Days:** £100 per day.

**How to Apply:**
Please send your CV and a headshot or recent photograph to **adam@ajdance.co.uk**.

*Important: Please ensure you use the subject line "Danny Go" so your application is not missed.
*
Tag any fantastic performers below who would be perfect for this! 👇🎭

items.summary:
🌟 **CASTING CALL: Male-Identifying Performer for Danny Go! Tribute Show** 🌟
Are you ready to bring the energy and get everyone moving? We are casting a vibrant, male-identifying performer to step into the shoes of Danny Go! for an exciting live tribute show at Otterspool Adventure in Liverpool.

**📍 Location:** Otterspool Adventure, Liverpool
**📅 Initial Dates:** 16th & 17th May
*(Note: There will be further work available throughout the year in this role and within our numerous other productions!)*

**The Role:**
 * You will host and perform a fast-paced, 30-minute scripted one-man show.
 * You must be highly confident, able to command the stage, and bring massive amounts of energy.
 * Crucially, you must have the skills to keep an audience of toddlers fully engaged and entertained from start to finish!
* Visually, you'll be able to accurately portray the role of Danny Go!

**Remuneration:**
 * **Rehearsals:** Paid hourly at the National Minimum Wage (NMW) for your age group.
 * **Performance Days:** £100 per day.

**How to Apply:**
Please send your CV and a headshot or recent photograph to **adam@ajdance.co.uk**.

*Important: Please ensure you use the subject line "Danny Go" so your application is not missed.
*
Tag any fantastic performers below who would be perfect for this! 👇🎭
items.title: 🌟 **CASTING CALL: Male-Identifying Performer for Danny Go! Tribute Show** 🌟

sharedPost.text:
Acting is Not the Jobs

I wrote this monologue for the actors in my weekly workshop in Ryde. 

But really, it’s for every actor who’s ever sat in their car after class thinking, “Why do I do this?”

It’s for the ones juggling shifts and self-tapes.  
For the ones who haven’t booked in a year but still turn up on Tuesday nights.  
For the drama students wondering if the industry even wants them.

Acting isn’t just the jobs. The jobs are rare.  
Acting is finding yourself in yourself.  
It’s finding yourself in others.  
It’s the reminder that you’re not mad — there are other humans on this earth just as obsessed with telling stories as you are.

If you need that reminder today, this one’s for you.

•  #ukactor
•  #britishactor
•  #northernactor
•  #manchesteractor
•  #leedsactor
•  #tvactor

🎬 **CASTING CALL – North West UK**
Looking for actors for an upcoming  film shot in South Manchester. 

Casting call .  Fake News series. Comedy/ Drama 

3 supporting roles 

Follow the project on Instagram:  @fakenewsmovie

✨ Mum / Auntie 

Aged 35-52

Brown eyes , naturally Brunette hair ( could be dyed)

4'10-5'3.

Storyline  , your betrayal your daughter Trust.

✨ Jessica 18/20

Storyline : you accidentally break your cousins trust 

✨ Maria 

18-24

Able to do a French  European accent or naturally European.

Storyline : you fall in love in a meet cute and exchange messages  with a boy.

Drama / action  comedy , satire .

A young man will take massive risks to his freedom to try and win back his girlfriend.

📍 Manchester) Stockport 

📅 Dates TBC - May /June 

⚠️ Unpaid (travel + catering provided)

📩 Send headshot, availability & showreel to:

richardmichaelmartinhowe1@outlook.com

Email for more information and send either video link , or a show reel link , your c.v. or spotlight.

All applications are fully considered. So don't hesitate to send some information and something for us to watch about yourself and highlights your acting and performing talents.

Please share with actors in the **North West

#CastingCallUK #NorthWestActors #ActorsWanted #IndieFilm #ShortFilmCasting

items.text:
𝐓𝐈𝐂𝐊𝐄𝐓𝐒 𝐀𝐑𝐄 𝐍𝐎𝐖 𝐀𝐕𝐀𝐈𝐋𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 – 𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐀𝐂𝐀𝐃𝐄𝐌𝐘’𝐒 𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐒 & 𝐅𝐈𝐋𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐊𝐄𝐑𝐒 𝐍𝐄𝐓𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐄𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐓

 

Following the incredible turnout and fantastic feedback from our last event, we are thrilled to announce that tickets are now available for the next Marble Academy Actors & Filmmakers Networking Event.

 

If you are serious about building your career in the industry, this is an event you do not want to miss.

Networking is one of the most powerful ways to create opportunities, and this event is designed to bring together a wide range of talented industry professionals in one dynamic, welcoming space. From actors and directors to producers and crew, you’ll have the chance to make valuable connections, spark new collaborations, and open doors to future work.

 

𝐖𝐡𝐲 𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝?

Because the right conversation can lead to:

Auditions and casting opportunities

Short film collaborations

Paid work and crew placements

Long-term creative partnerships

Whether you are:

an actor looking to raise your profile

a director searching for fresh talent

a producer building your next project

or a crew member looking for new opportunities

 

this event gives you the chance to meet the people who could help shape your next step in the industry.

 

𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐃𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬:

𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐞: 𝐒𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐚𝐲, 𝟐𝟖𝐭𝐡 𝐉𝐮𝐧𝐞 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔

𝐓𝐢𝐦𝐞: 𝟐:𝟎𝟎 𝐏𝐌 – 𝟔:𝟑𝟎 𝐏𝐌

𝐕𝐞𝐧𝐮𝐞: 𝐇𝐎𝐌𝐄 𝐌𝐜𝐫, 𝟐 𝐓𝐨𝐧𝐲 𝐖𝐢𝐥𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐏𝐥𝐚𝐜𝐞, 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫, 𝐌𝟏𝟓 𝟒𝐅𝐍

 

Tickets are available from this link:

www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/actors-and-filmmakers-networking-event-tickets-1983730891497

 

Bring your energy, your ambition, and your passion for the industry — and join us for an afternoon of inspiring conversations, new connections, and exciting possibilities.

 

Tickets are expected to attract strong interest, so secure yours early.

 

Share with the actors, filmmakers, and creatives in your circle — this is where opportunities begin.

sharedPost.text:
Come see the show!
Opening this week!

Wed - Sun 
April 29 - May 3rd
Lion & Unicorn Theatre 

Something Clean by Selina Fillinger

Tony-Award nominated playwright Selina
Fillinger  soars in this intimate drama
following one woman struggling to make sense
of her own grief, love, and culpability.

Charlotte has been a mother for nineteen years,
a wife for three decades, and a respectable
community member her entire life. But when her
only child is incarcerated for sexual assault, her
once-immaculate world is forever tainted.

Produced by T. Regina Theatre Co. (Scenes
with girls, My Name is Rachel Corrie, Late A
Cowboy Song).

Raising awareness for The Survivor’s Trust, (supporting specialist rape and sexual abuse services)

Cast -
Katherine Oliver - Charlotte
Lawrence Carmichael - Doug
Felipe Chavez - Joey

Production Team -
Director Alex Stroming,
Assistant Director/Stage Manager Jessica Potts
Co-Designers Emily Nelson and Agathe Williamson
Movement Director Tutu Ching
Lighting Designer Phil Hamilton
Intimacy Director Liz Kent  
Voice & Dialect Coach Meighread Dandeneau

Follow us on social media:
https://www.instagram.com/t.reginatheatreco/

Tickets:
https://app.lineupnow.com/event/something-cle

At The Lion and Unicorn Theatre
42-44 Gaisford St, Kentish Town, London
NW5 2ED, United Kingdom
Run Time: approx. 90 minutes

items.text:
💛 ODLOTOWY CASTING DO REKLAMY BANKU – STARTUJEMY! 💛

Szukamy nowych twarzy do wyjątkowego projektu reklamowego 💛
Bardzo mile widziani studenci szkół aktorskich!🤩

✨ KOGO SZUKAMY?

👩‍❤️‍👨 DZIEWCZYNY & CHŁOPAKI, DO BOJU! 👩‍❤️‍👨 WIEK: 18 - 26 LAT🎈

W całym castingu trzymamy się urody white caucasian.

ROLE GŁÓWNE:

👩 Dziewczyna (18–24)
Dziewczęca, naturalna, charyzmatyczna.
Szukamy osoby z energią swojego pokolenia, która swobodnie czuje się przed kamerą i z którą widz łatwo się utożsami.
Dłuższe włosy mile widziane, ale najważniejsze są umiejętności aktorskie.

👨 Chłopak (18–24)
Charyzmatyczny, zapadający w pamięć.
Z energią i autentycznością, która przyciąga uwagę.
Dłuższe włosy mile widziane, ale kluczowe są umiejętności aktorskie i swoboda przed kamerą.

🎭 ROLE EPIZODYCZNE

📅 TIMING:

27.04 (do KOŃCA DNIA) – termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

Dla wszystkich:
👉Wizytówka (obowiązkowa)

Plus standardowo - dane kontaktowe, zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki ☺️

items.text:
Auditions for The Spitfire Grill
Auditions!!!

The Spitfire Grill-The Musical

Music and Book by James Valcq 

Lyrics and Book by Fred Alley

Directed by Ella Wyatt

Monday, April 27 @ 7pm

Callbacks: by invitation Wednesday, April 29 @ 7pm

Synopsis:

The musical depicts the journey of a young woman just released from prison, who decides to start her life anew in a rural town in Wisconsin. She participates in a journey within the town toward its own tenuous reawakening.

Please prepare a song of your choice, an accompanist will be provided. 32 bars

Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.

Cold reading sides will be provided at auditions.

Performances: July 10 to August 2, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm

Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees July 18 and August 1 at 2:00pm

Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente

Mon–Thurs, 7:00pm, with some Saturdays

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

(Tech/Dress Rehearsal week rehearsals may be extended.)

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.

There is a $100 stipend offered

Character Breakdown can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaUN0c1JhV29JMUFpUWN1NXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5u2s8JPZvLnjKtydEhs6BkHxK8l8k9R3IXSoE2NwpyZkIXOADty48E_oY5Nw_aem_5edgXDemxfi2rbHAIpzVEQ)

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Title: Where You Came From

Genre: Comedy

Logline: Mauri is leaving for Africa... her mom isn't so sure about that...

Role: Frank. Between late forties and early sixties. Frank is a little bit of a mess, but he is Mauri's father through and through. He's supportive, unprofessional, and maybe a little hungover.

Production Company: This is a UCCS capstone film by Joseph Impellitteri with Christian Winkler and Onyx Riccelli producing

Production Type: Student Film

Contact Information: email me at jvitoimp@gmail.com or text me at 859-444-7502

Run Time: Short (~10 min)

Compensation: Paid ($25)

Union Status: Non-Union (not a hard line though)

Audition Information: Reach out to me; all auditions will be digital

Shooting Schedule: May 3rd, all day (12 hour shoot). Tentatively, 7 am-7 pm

Filming Location: Old North End in Colorado Springs (near downtown)

Project Description: I think the script is funny (bias). If you like comedy, message me!

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - COLORADO FEATURE FILM**

DURANGO SEEMS LIKE A GREAT PLACE TO DIE

*After a heartbreaking divorce, Ezra begrudgingly joins his bohemian mother on a road trip across Colorado to help her die.*

It’s a very funny movie, with serious undertones. And at its core – it’s a mother/son story. Our story is centered around Medical Aid in Dying and explores the relationships that really impact and shape our adult lives.

Writer/Directors: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Executive Producers: AJ Campli, Matt Bruggeman, Boulder Media House, Tyler Sapp, Chloe Chamberlain & Jill Coats

Producer: Tyler Sapp

Casting Director: Chloe Chamberlain

Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

Locations: Denver, CO / Boulder, CO / Durango, CO

**Roles:**

**Sonia ***Lead*

65-72 / Female

Sonia is a 67 year old free spirit who’s spent the last 30 years or so kicking it around Boulder, Colorado after she graduated from Naropa. She’s a sex positive, free wheeling bohemian, who spent the majority of the early 70s trying to relive the 60s. Lots of acid and counter-cultural literature, Grateful Dead shows and the like, until she became a mom. That’s Sonia’s past though. We meet Sonia in the present day; after the death of her beloved husband, Michael, she has plenty of alone time to look back on her full life before her adult son, Ezra, moves back in. Sonia purports strength and wisdom, but really, she seems to be grieving the loss of youth. As she looks at her mortality squarely, she decides to take things into her own hands, and she sets out to end her own life through Medical Aid in Dying, even though she doesn’t exactly qualify…
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Ezra ***Lead*

30-36 / Male

Ezra is a 34 year old man who – more often than not – has something to say about, well, everything. He has an MFA in Creative Writing & PhD in Postmodern Literature from Denver University, and he’s got a whole bunch of opinions on what makes up a valuable opinion. He’s the kind of guy who’s quick to comment on why a certain book or film is low brow, and he's hellbent on being the smartest guy in the room – even if it’s at the expense of those around him. He’s a “writer” but really, lately, he’s a professor that writes. We meet Ezra at quite the inflection point in his life – his wife has left him, he’s moved back in with his mother (whom he has an irrationally short fuse with) and he’s recently been placed on sabbatical for the upcoming semester. Ezra’s looking for answers, even if he won’t admit it until he absolutely must.
* Rate: ~$8,000 Project Flat
* Duration: ~18 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/1 - 7/14 & 8/14 - 8/21

**Hayduke ***Supporting*

65-75 / Male

Hayduke is a 70 year old male. Ex-hippie, Grateful Dead fan, very counter cultural. Strong comedic skills preferred.

* Rate: ~$1,500 Project Flat
* Duration: ~3 Days on Set + Rehearsal
* Shooting Dates: 7/12 - 7/14

_______________________________________
Thank you for your interest in our project! Please submit here:
[[[https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)](https://forms.gle/xcwVATkU5L7T11Hs5)

Please keep an eye out for more roles and updates in the coming weeks. Cheers!

Next Sunday!  Pueblo Memorial Hall. Doors open at 5:30pm

Come check out one of the biggest film festivals in Colorado!  

https://www.kickassfilmfest.com/event-details/kick-ass-film-fest-red-carpet-award-ceremony-live-2026

sharedPost.text:
🎬 This is the BIG event. The 2026 Kickass Film Fest Red Carpet & Awards Show is where it all comes together. May 3rd, at Pueblo Memorial Hall tickets on sale now.

✨ Walk the Red Carpet with the Stars
🎥 Watch the Top 7 films created in just 72 hours
🏆 Experience a high-energy live awards show

Colorado’s top filmmakers, actors, and creatives… all in one room.
From the moment you walk in, it’s energy. Cameras flashing. Interviews rolling. A full red carpet experience hosted by Minnequa Works Credit Union. Then we hit the screen to see the best film nominees. The real stories behind them. Live Q&A with the creators. And then… we crown the winners!

🍿 This Sunday, May 3rd at Pueblo Memorial Hall
Doors open at 5:00pm
Red Carpet starts at 5:30pm
Screening + Q&A at 6:30pm
Awards to follow hosted by @novameets

🎟️ www.kickassfilmfest.com/tickets

items.text: I am producing a music video on Saturday, May 9th, and I am looking for several distinctive elements to enhance the production. These elements include celebrity impersonators, a snake measuring three feet or longer, a belly dancer, a donkey or goat, and a little person. Additionally, any unusual or extraordinary elements would be welcome. The event will offer unlimited 420 and catered food. Payment will be discussed. Please help me locate these elements. Thank you.

topComments.text: "a video"?  Music video?  Ugc content, vertical, short, feature, commercial, pilot????
I am non of these but this sounds so much fun 🤩

items.text:
Horror Web Series Casting Call in Thornton CO
CASTING CALL - Micro Vertical Found Footage Horror Web Series

Title: "CHAPTER 0"

Logline: A few weeks bedore a new horror escape room's grand opening, unusual experiences cause a paranoid employee to be concerned about the real-life maniac whose grisly murders inspired the game.

Genre: Found Footage Horror

Format: 10 (2-3 minutes each) vertical webisodes

Writer/Directors: Jerrod D. Brito (https://www.sharpspoonpictures.com/about-us.html) & Chris Guite

Executive Producer: Tim Carillo

Shooting Dates: A few flexible shooting nights between May 1st and May 30th

Locations: Thornton, CO

Roles:

RILEY (Lead)

Age: 18-22

Description: A new hire who doesn't enjoy horror, but took a Game Master job at a nearby escape room for the flexible hours and the ability to do homework there at night while waiting for deliveries in the weeks before the escape room opens. Riley is easily spooked, enjoys making vlogs, and though he/she/they isn't afraid of ghosts, nothing chills Riley more than real-life killers.

* These shorts will be roughly scripted, but in the spirit of found footage films, we are primarily looking for natural influencer-type personalities who are able to ad-lib when necessary.

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 3-4 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

ROBERT (Cameo)

Age: ???

Description: It could be a tall man in all black, lurking in the shadows, or it could just be our imaginations, our sleepless eyes playing tricks on us. Only our editor knows for sure...

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 2-3 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

AUDITION INFO: If you're interested in these roles, please send an email, headshot, resume, your desired fee, and any relevant reels or samples to jerrodbrito@gmail.com with the subject "CHAPTER 0" for consideration. Selected performers will be asked to submit a short video audition based on a prompt.

Thank you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of fire escape

topComments.text: Would love to learn more about Riley!

sharedPost.text:

sharedPost.text:
BEYOND OBSESSION lösen das Rätsel

Kürzlich sendeten Beyond Obsession unter ihrem neuesten Video die Nachricht, dass sie, auf den Drehort bezogen, keine Kosten und Mühen für den Film gescheut hätten, verraten aber nichts. 

Nun dann: Der ein oder andere Fan wird anhand der Bilder, die einen strahlend blauen Himmel mit einem beinahe wüstenartigen, ockerfarbigen Strand und einen steinernen pyramidenartigen Turm zeigen, einen Ort am Mittelmeer assoziieren, wobei das Gebäude unweigerlich an die spanischen Mühlen erinnert, gegen die Miguel de Cervantes' Don Quijote zusammen mit Sancho Panza einst kämpften. 

Aussichtsreicher dagegen erkämpft sich Marco den Weg durch den Sand hin zu den markanten Treppenbalken, welche den Keyboarder zu dem seitlichen, schneckenhausartigen Aufgang leiten, über den er den höchsten Punkt am Meer erklimmt:

Wurde an der spanischen Mittelmeerküste gedreht ?

Über den beschriebenen Bildern schwebt der Sänger Nils Upahl. Wie eine Erscheinung, wie ein Engel singt er aus den Wolken heraus die Botschaft von "In My Blood", aber Hinweise auf das genaue Ziel des Kamerateams lassen sich nicht ableiten.

Doch soeben wurde das Rätsel gelöst:

Marco Bartz schreibt in seiner heutigen Story, wo Beyond Obsession das Musikvideo "In My Blood" gedreht haben:

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark; **Remith Ramesh**, India; **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey; **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey; **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia; **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, USA, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/

Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de
items.previewTitle: International Summer Academy – Chekhov World Theatre
items.previewDescription: Intensives Michael‑Chekhov‑Training trifft traditionelle Performance. Workshops, Showcases & interkultureller Austausch.

Mutige Darsteller/in in Düsseldorf und Umgebung gesucht 🎞🎥

Das wohl mutigste Kurzfilm Projekt steht uns bevor! 

Dazu werden noch Schauspieler und Komparsen gesucht! 🫵 (m/w/d)
Hast du Lust vor der Kamera zu stehen und kein Problem "Preußen" in die Welt zu rufen, dann bist du hier genau richtig!

🔲 Wann? Mai/Juni 2026
🔲 Wo? Raum Düsseldorf 
🔲 Gage? No Budget 

Die gemachten Aufnahmen dürfen für's persönliche Showreel frei genutzt werden. Für Verpflegung 🥘 ist gesorgt. Gage kann leider nicht gezahlt werden.

Ziel ist es einen modernen Kurzfilm in höchster Kinoqualität zu produzieren 💪

Bewerbung, bitte mit Infos (Alter, Schauspielerfahrung,...) und zwei Fotos als PN an mich!

Danke und viel Erfolg!
Aus Rheinprovinz

Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

items.text:
PAID Voice Acting Casting Call
Hi everyone!

We are currently casting a VOICE ACTOR for our Graduation NFS Film ‘WISP’, a haunting coming-of-age drama about queer isolation and the grip of an unseen presence.

Flat Payment of £100. We are looking for experienced Voice Actors Only.

English accent much preferred

SYNOPSIS:

17 year old Noah has spent weeks drifting from everyone he loves, manipulated by an hidden voice in the woods. When his best friend Sam turns up on Valentines, Noah finds himself caught between feelings he’s long buried and the Voice that refuses to let him go.

CASTING FOR:   THE VOICE,   THE ANTAGONIST

Male, age 25-95.

Talks to Noah whenever he is alone. Calm, authoritative, paternal, enticing. Toes the line between being comforting and controlling. It speaks with eerie familiarity and intimacy, like someone who knows Noah too well.

You can choose to go deep with the voice, just don't go too monstrous or very overly creepy, the voice is trying to entice Noah.

CASTING PROCESS:

Record the following lines for your audition & email to jaxonmurtaghmedia@gmail.com

"Aren't you tired of waiting? Watching everyone else find it, while you're  stuck, unnoticed, unloved. I know it  hurts Noah, but I didn't want to rush  you. I let you grow"

"Well done Noah. They don't need more than that. There are comforts Noah,  but that's all they are. Don't let them get in the way."

"He was aways going to leave. They're Passing comforts, Noah. Don't  forget who's been there for you. You've been ready longer than you think"

Deadline - 28th April 23:59

Many Thanks!

Live Script Readings - British Urban Film Festival
Hello everyone!

The British Urban Film Festival are looking for a few more roles for the live script readings. 

Please send an email to anniearaba@gmail.com if you’re interested ASAP ⭐️ We are particularly interested in Irish speakers.

I’ll be at the Wessagussett Wetland and Woodland - Historic Conservation Site on Saturday, April 25th 9-12 for the Town Wide Clean Up.

I’ll be back with the crew on Saturday, May 2 for our Annual Earth Day Festivities from 10am to 5pm!

We will be doing Invasive Plant removal - digging up Garlic Mustard!!  

Hope to see you there!!

Title: Muse

Live Audition. Sunday, May 3rd.

This is a documentary project following a retired painter. Participants will be asked to sit for our artist for a 5 to 10 minute filmed audition. Selected participants will be asked to return for further paid involvement in the documentary. Auditions will be recorded and used in the film.

There is a limited number of slots. Please email [musefilmcasting@gmail.com](mailto:musefilmcasting@gmaiul.com) with any follow up questions. If interested in auditioning, please provide a recent photo and include your availability May 3rd from 10am-4pm.

[KRAKÓW]
Poszukuję aktorki w wieku 20-25 LAT

Projekt to kampania społeczna na temat zdrowia- scenki aranżowanej sondy ulicznej wśród kobiet. Materiały w formie krótkich reels na social media.

📍 Nagrania: 23.04 (czwartek)
godziny: ok. 11:30-16:00

Stawka: 800 zł netto

Produkcja nie przewiduje zwrotu kosztów logistycznych.

❗️Proszę o zgłaszanie się osób, które na pewno mogą być w tym terminie i tych godzinach w Krakowie i które akceptują wszystkie warunki.

Zgłoszenie zawierające:
- zdjęcie portretowe i zdjęcie sylwetki
- krótkie video z mówieniem do kamery (np. wizytówka)
przesyłać na adres: [casting@krakrafilms.com](mailto:casting@krakrafilms.com)

items.text:
SICK OF PAYING FEES FOR BASIC WORKSHOPS?

➡️ I will be running FREE 😃 workshop classes in Runcorn/Manchester UK soon, involving entry level practical exercises in the 'Catbirding'™️ method syllabuses.

Hi 👋 I'm Juliet Delta. An author, screenwriter, and actor for 10 years, once upon a time! I invented a system to learn more about characterisation as it seemed there were no real classes teaching it in the correct form.

⚠️THE REAL-WORLD⚠️

🐦A Catbird is a species of bird that is able to observe, assess, and replicate other animals calls, such as other birds, cats, even a dogs bark, as well as other noises like alarms, vehicles, and even machinery to such precision that you would believe it to be the real thing.🐦

And it's on this basis of parallels to my system that I named it 'Catbirding'

➡️During these workshops I will take you through an introduction to Catbirding and the understanding of Behavioural traits assessment and translation into character creation and performance.

👇Exercises include:
1. Self-awareness assessment of character 
2. Behavioural observation & character creation
3. Performance of Behavioural translation
4. 3x different real-world exercises where the catbirding method can be applied in acting/writing career scenarios.

➡️This will be your free basic introduction, and once you have grasped the concept and process you can study further on the standard or advanced syllabuses under my coaching within a small class of 6-10 students only, for up to a 10 week term. Fees will be as minimal as possible to make these great syllabuses accessible to all demographics.😃

👍The standard and advanced syllabuses involve fully immersive practical exercises that will help push your boundaries and excel your confidence and the quality of your performance in ways never  attempted before.

❌️ I know how dissatisfied and disappointed we can be as actors leaving workshops that didn't teach us anything new or we endured a director simply giving his self indulgent life story for the whole class until you fall asleep. I've forked out £50-80 for these "classes" and felt robbed everytime.😤

✌️Let me show you where the real next level to your acting skills and understanding of characterisation lies, and it isn't patronising or time wasting. It's a passage to uncharted territory that I discovered and carried out myself as an actor whilst experimenting in 2015/16.

🐦 'Catbirding - a creative approach to practical method acting' is the title of the book and is now a full system after 2 years research and writing structure to an academic level where other tutors can teach the system in schools, drama schools, studios, and privately.🐦

⁉️ Want to learn more about the ethics and system of this new characterisation method called Catbirding?

Follow me and share this post to keep up to date with all new information on free class dates and locations.

➡️The book on Catbirding will be released soon so you can learn at home at your own pace before deciding on applying to join a syllabus class under my tuition.

🤩 Also, I will be offering private tuition for students that complete the standard syllabus so we can take you through to catbirding mastery on a 1-on-1 basis of intense immersive activities.

1️⃣There has never been a system so brave to push boundaries that have always been there yet ignored for fear of controversy.

2️⃣I myself practiced this method for 2 years in the real-world and the boundaries came under my control once I understood the art in the mastery.

3️⃣Let me guide you there too, and blow your mind at the revelation of just how great an actor you are!

You just have not experienced the epiphany yet.

👉This is not industry advice. It doesnt involve tips on how to get an agent. I am not teaching you how to act. You have learnt that yourself and you act your way.👍

I am showing you how to connect your mind, body, and soul into a committed process to access tools nobody every told you about because no other tutor went as deep into immersion as I did.😁

⁉️ Not Chekhov, not Mamet, or even Hagen immersed into real-world behaviour and performance as I did. All previous tutors taught characterisation in controlled classroom environments on a theoretical basis.

⚠️ Be that actor to pioneer a new level of practical skill set and take your training and acting into the real-world.

No more faking it. 👊

🔍 Observe the world. 
📖 Study behaviour.
🤸‍♀️ Become the character.

#character #characterdevelopment #acting #workshop #methodacting #catbirding 😘

SICK OF PAYING FEES FOR BASIC WORKSHOPS?

➡️ I will be running FREE 😃 workshop classes in Runcorn/Manchester UK soon, involving entry level practical exercises in the 'Catbirding'™️ method syllabuses.

Hi 👋 I'm Juliet Delta. An author, screenwriter, and actor for 10 years, once upon a time! I invented a system to learn more about characterisation as it seemed there were no real classes teaching it in the correct form.

⚠️THE REAL-WORLD⚠️

🐦A Catbird is a species of bird that is able to observe, assess, and replicate other animals calls, such as other birds, cats, even a dogs bark, as well as other noises like alarms, vehicles, and even machinery to such precision that you would believe it to be the real thing.🐦

And it's on this basis of parallels to my system that I named it 'Catbirding'

➡️During these workshops I will take you through an introduction to Catbirding and the understanding of Behavioural traits assessment and translation into character creation and performance.

👇Exercises include:
1. Self-awareness assessment of character 
2. Behavioural observation & character creation
3. Performance of Behavioural translation
4. 3x different real-world exercises where the catbirding method can be applied in acting/writing career scenarios.

➡️This will be your free basic introduction, and once you have grasped the concept and process you can study further on the standard or advanced syllabuses under my coaching within a small class of 6-10 students only, for up to a 10 week term. Fees will be as minimal as possible to make these great syllabuses accessible to all demographics.😃

👍The standard and advanced syllabuses involve fully immersive practical exercises that will help push your boundaries and excel your confidence and the quality of your performance in ways never  attempted before.

❌️ I know how dissatisfied and disappointed we can be as actors leaving workshops that didn't teach us anything new or we endured a director simply giving his self indulgent life story for the whole class until you fall asleep. I've forked out £50-80 for these "classes" and felt robbed everytime.😤

✌️Let me show you where the real next level to your acting skills and understanding of characterisation lies, and it isn't patronising or time wasting. It's a passage to uncharted territory that I discovered and carried out myself as an actor whilst experimenting in 2015/16.

🐦 'Catbirding - a creative approach to practical method acting' is the title of the book and is now a full system after 2 years research and writing structure to an academic level where other tutors can teach the system in schools, drama schools, studios, and privately.🐦

⁉️ Want to learn more about the ethics and system of this new characterisation method called Catbirding?

Follow me and share this post to keep up to date with all new information on free class dates and locations.

➡️The book on Catbirding will be released soon so you can learn at home at your own pace before deciding on applying to join a syllabus class under my tuition.

🤩 Also, I will be offering private tuition for students that complete the standard syllabus so we can take you through to catbirding mastery on a 1-on-1 basis of intense immersive activities.

1️⃣There has never been a system so brave to push boundaries that have always been there yet ignored for fear of controversy.

2️⃣I myself practiced this method for 2 years in the real-world and the boundaries came under my control once I understood the art in the mastery.

3️⃣Let me guide you there too, and blow your mind at the revelation of just how great an actor you are!

You just have not experienced the epiphany yet.

👉This is not industry advice. It doesnt involve tips on how to get an agent. I am not teaching you how to act. You have learnt that yourself and you act your way.👍

I am showing you how to connect your mind, body, and soul into a committed process to access tools nobody every told you about because no other tutor went as deep into immersion as I did.😁

⁉️ Not Chekhov, not Mamet, or even Hagen immersed into real-world behaviour and performance as I did. All previous tutors taught characterisation in controlled classroom environments on a theoretical basis.

⚠️ Be that actor to pioneer a new level of practical skill set and take your training and acting into the real-world.

No more faking it. 👊

🔍 Observe the world. 
📖 Study behaviour.
🤸‍♀️ Become the character.

#character #characterdevelopment #acting #workshop #methodacting #catbirding 😘

items.text:
CGTV question 
Did anyone take their kid to a CGTV audition and not get a callback saying they were picked as one of the 50?

My daughter got called back and told she was one of the few but I was just wondering if they say that to everyone.

topComments.text: Scam. Everyone gets invited back your a paying customer. You can self submit to agencies for free. It should never cost you anything to get in front of an agent. Go on the sag list and self submit for free! CGTV, Barbizon, ipop, etc are all unnecessary cash grabs that target unsuspecting parents.
It’s a scam, everyone gets invited, and they charge huge fees for kids’ representation.

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Bezdomny 1 (40–50) - zaniedbany wygląd, ubranie warstwowe, „uliczne”, bardziej wycofany, mniej rozmowny, reaguje głównie na zachowanie kolegi i policjantów.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

2. Bezdomny 2 (40-50) - również zaniedbany, ale bardziej rozmowny i emocjonalny, poczucie winy po kradzieży portfela, łatwiej się łamie.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Igor Flaszka (41) - lokalny lichwiarz, „uliczny oprych w drogim wdzianku”. Z jednej strony bardzo uprzejmy, kulturalny, dobrze ubrany (drogi garnitur, zegarek, zadbany wygląd), z drugiej czuć od niego uliczny cynizm i twardość. Typ, który świetnie gra wzorowego obywatela, ale pod powierzchnią jest bezwzględny i niebezpieczny.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

4. Marcin Pawlicki (39) – prywatny detektyw - inteligentny, schludny, ale trochę „po przejściach”, niezależny typ. Powinien mieć wiarygodny vibe prywatnego detektywa: laptop, telefon, auto, lekkie nerwy. 

Data: 07. i 08. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

5. Niezłomny, Artur Nowicki (45) – mężczyzna o „bandyckim” wyglądzie, po kilku odsiadkach; twardy, budzący respekt, raczej masywna postura, szorstki w obyciu. W scenach jest agresywny i niecierpliwy.

Data: 06. i 07. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

6. Barman (30) – typ „sprytny kombinator”, ale bez przesadnej bandyckości; pracownik baru 24/7, podlizujący się klientom, przy policji udaje głupszego niż jest.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Menel 1 (40-50) - mocno zaniedbany, pijany/otumaniony, bardziej pasywny (półleży na ławce). 

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

8. Menel 2 (41) - również zaniedbany, ale bardziej agresywny, wybuchowy, widocznie pijany, atakuje Ratownika i Gośkę.

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

9. Mariusz Borowski (37) – mężczyzna przeciętnej postury. Przytłoczony problemami, które powoduje. Żyje w ciągłym strachu. 

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

10. Ratownik medyczny (30-40) –  EPIZOD BEZ TEKSTU

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.summary:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Bezdomny 1 (40–50) - zaniedbany wygląd, ubranie warstwowe, „uliczne”, bardziej wycofany, mniej rozmowny, reaguje głównie na zachowanie kolegi i policjantów.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

2. Bezdomny 2 (40-50) - również zaniedbany, ale bardziej rozmowny i emocjonalny, poczucie winy po kradzieży portfela, łatwiej się łamie.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Igor Flaszka (41) - lokalny lichwiarz, „uliczny oprych w drogim wdzianku”. Z jednej strony bardzo uprzejmy, kulturalny, dobrze ubrany (drogi garnitur, zegarek, zadbany wygląd), z drugiej czuć od niego uliczny cynizm i twardość. Typ, który świetnie gra wzorowego obywatela, ale pod powierzchnią jest bezwzględny i niebezpieczny.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

4. Marcin Pawlicki (39) – prywatny detektyw - inteligentny, schludny, ale trochę „po przejściach”, niezależny typ. Powinien mieć wiarygodny vibe prywatnego detektywa: laptop, telefon, auto, lekkie nerwy. 

Data: 07. i 08. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

5. Niezłomny, Artur Nowicki (45) – mężczyzna o „bandyckim” wyglądzie, po kilku odsiadkach; twardy, budzący respekt, raczej masywna postura, szorstki w obyciu. W scenach jest agresywny i niecierpliwy.

Data: 06. i 07. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

6. Barman (30) – typ „sprytny kombinator”, ale bez przesadnej bandyckości; pracownik baru 24/7, podlizujący się klientom, przy policji udaje głupszego niż jest.

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Menel 1 (40-50) - mocno zaniedbany, pijany/otumaniony, bardziej pasywny (półleży na ławce). 

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

8. Menel 2 (41) - również zaniedbany, ale bardziej agresywny, wybuchowy, widocznie pijany, atakuje Ratownika i Gośkę.

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

9. Mariusz Borowski (37) – mężczyzna przeciętnej postury. Przytłoczony problemami, które powoduje. Żyje w ciągłym strachu. 

Data: 06. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

10. Ratownik medyczny (30-40) –  EPIZOD BEZ TEKSTU

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Rozpoczynamy zdjęcia do nowego filmu fabularnego w Darłowie, poszukujemy statystów w wieku 18-90 lat, głównie do roli przechodniów na rynku. 

DATY ZDJĘĆ: 9, 10, 11 (osoby z samochodami), 15 (potrzebujemy najwięcej osób - można zgłaszać się całymi rodzinami), 16, 17, 18, 19, 24/06/2026

Szukamy osób tylko z Darłowa i okolic. Nie zapewniamy transportu z innych miast. 

Można zgłosić się na wybrane lub wszystkie dni zdjęciowe. 

Każda osobą, która wyśle zgłoszenie, będzie miała możliwość uczestnictwa w zdjęciach. Nie trzeba mieć doświadczenia. 

STAWKI: 110 zł netto za dzień zdjęciowy 
(osoba z autem + 60 zł)

ZGŁOSZENIA:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

W treści prosimy podać:
- imię i nazwisko
- wiek
- numer telefonu
- miejsce zamieszkania
- daty dyspozycyjności 
- zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki 
W tytule: FILM DARŁOWO 

Prosimy o przemyślane zgłoszenia. Dziękujemy!

items.text:
ACTING & IMPROV PROGRAM
with Wojciech Medyński

3 months. One group. Real progress.

This is a focused, long-term training for actors and creatives who want to go deeper into the craft.

Not drop-ins. Not surface-level exercises.

A consistent group working week by week on presence, character, and truthful performance.

We use improvisation as a tool to unlock spontaneity, connection, and real reactions on stage.

WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

On-stage presence and confidence
Character building and objectives
Emotional truth and connection
Listening and reacting in the moment
Improvisation as a foundation for acting
Scene work in pairs and ensemble

WHO THIS IS FOR

Actors, performers, and curious beginners who are ready to commit.

You don’t need experience.
You need willingness to show up and work.

FORMAT

Closed group
Once a week
2 hours per session
3-month program

Small group to keep the work focused and personal.

INSTRUCTOR

Wojciech Medyński

Professional actor working across theatre, film, and television.
Trained at the Łódź Film School.
Experience in Teatr Jaracza and Teatr Syrena in Warsaw.

DETAILS

Atlas Tower, Warsaw
Starts in May

Exact day and time confirmed based on the group.

PRICE

1500 PLN full program
500 PLN monthly option

Limited spots.

If you’re ready to commit and go deeper, join us.

Presented by Impact Warsaw
Perform. Create. Connect.

items.text:
**Sesja zdjęciowa**

Gdzie: **Warszawa**

Kto: **fotograf**

Kogo: **modela**, chłopaka o szczupłej/sportowej sylwetce

Brak wymaganego doświadczenia w pozowaniu, wystarczą chęci

Kiedy: **25 kwiecień 2026 sobota**

**Sesja zdjęciowa na zasadach TFP czyli pozowanie za zdjęcia.**

Do projektu fotograficznego w celu poszerzenia własnego portfolio szukam modela. Tak jak wcześniej pisałem, nie wymagam doświadczenia w pozowaniu. Sesja obejmuje zdjęcia portretowe, sylwetkowe i akty. Miejsce: jedna z warszawskich galerii w okolicy dworca zachodniego. Zależy mi m.in. na pokazaniu emocji całym ciałem. Szczegóły do omówienia w PW. Tylko osoby pełnoletnie.

**PS.** Zdjęcie dla uwagi

items.text:
I’m casting people in Georgia for a short cinematic YouTube project.

I’m looking for someone who is currently experiencing or reflecting on one of the following:

a dream or idea they haven’t started
a life transition or change
a creative block or reset
something personal they’ve been sitting with

Filming will take place within the next 1–2 weeks and will take about 1–2 hours total. Location will be local in Georgia and kept simple/comfortable.

This is an unpaid, passion-based creative project. Selected participants will receive a cinematic video feature, a copy of their final edited segment, and will be part of a storytelling series they can share once released (with permission).

No acting experience needed — just openness and comfort being on camera.
If you’re interested, please DM or email jcut22media@gmail.com 

You can also submit a short form here:

https://forms.gle/7W27ByJRQMp6iT3j9

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Energy Drink Spec! (OC/LA, Paid) 

Currently casting for (3) youthful, female leads for an energy drink spec for a growing production company. 

The shoot (non-union) will be in Los Angeles/Orange County, sometime in May, with a day rate of $50. Along with compensation, the actors will get some BTS & additional photos + videos for  their social media/reel/portfolio.  

ISO: 

(1) – Beach Runner: clean, natural, everyday, fit/athletic girl-next-door type of character, this position will require some light jogging/running 
(1) – Pilates/Yoga Practitioner: quiet confidence, natural vibe, fit/athletic, disciplined
(1) – Party Attendee: Free Spirited, extroverted, high energy, bright smile,bold-ish vibe, but still maintaining the clean, athletic/fit look, etc. 

* Each role will have different skills/requirements

If interested, please submit your: 
- Contact information
- Dates you’re available in May
- Headshot, full body shot, reel
- Resume
to riannamamitag.prod@gmail.com ! 

Please follow the subject line format of: First Last Name - Role(s) - Spec 

Looking forward to your submissions & connecting with you! Please submit your profile & related materials by 5/1 .

A Student Film

*Meet THE MANDELAS*
A 90s-style comedy about a family, a girlfriend, and a secret that won't stay hidden. In a world of new beginnings, Thabo is looking for a way out, the Reverend is looking for the truth, and Lerato is just looking for a nice dinner.

Dinner is served. Confession is mandatory. 

We’re looking for: 
Young Male (20s)
Young Woman (20s)
Older Man (40+)
Older Woman (30+)

Able to speak Xhosa

For more information. Contacts are on the poster🙏

🎬 CASTING CALL: IDENTICAL TWINS (GIRLS, 10–12)

We’re scouting identical twin girls across South Africa for an upcoming paid feature film shooting in Cape Town (June–September 2026).

✨ Requirements:
• Identical twin girls
• Ages 10–12
• Mixed race / ethnically ambiguous look
• Must have a valid SA or international passport (travel to Belgium required)

This is an exciting international opportunity for young talent to be part of a major production 🌍

📩 To apply:
Email: studio@zestcasting.com

Include:
• Recent photos of both twins
• Names & ages
• Contact details
• Where they are based

⏰ Deadline: 4 May 2026

Tag parents, friends, schools, or agents who might know the perfect twins! 

#twins #southafrica #casting #featurefilm #capetowncasting #zestcasting

items.text:
Du har et minut til at lave en ny hjemmelavet dessert, som jeg aldrig bliver træt af! 
Jeg har lavet denne kokosdessert i over 15 år nu. Min bedstemor lavede den længe før mig. Den er simpelthen den BEDSTE. I alle disse år har jeg ikke mødt en eneste person, der ikke har elsket den - og jeg bliver aldrig træt af den! 
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of egg yolk and dessert
